Off Calendar Oct-29-2007 Dismissal - No Appearance

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - off calendar, to be re-noticed in the Discovery Department. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Plaintiff Capital Once Bank'S Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Capital One Bank's motion to compel responses to interrogatories and requests for admissions is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with CCP 1005. The motion was filed on September 28, 2007. In addition, plaintiff shall comply with San Francisco Superior Court Rule 10 C. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Set For Trial On Oct-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
